Document:
# Brigmedic This is where I would put the Brigmedic Figurine.. IF I HAD ONE!
“This mixture is a Warcrime? No, silly! Warcrimes can only be done during times of war!”
- Advised, but not required, to remain within the Brig to ensure injured [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color] and Prisoners can be treated in a timely manner.
- Expected to perform [bold][color=#25739c]Corpsman[/bold][/color] duties if there is no [bold][color=#25739c]Corpsman[/bold][/color] on shift.
## Has the Authority to: - Issue a temporary Non-Revival order of an individual if they have committed suicide at least two times.
It will still require the stamp of the [bold][color=#e6b363]Chief Medical Officer[/bold][/color] for it to be turned into a Do Not Revive (DNR) order.
## Responsible for: - Manufacturing Chemicals & Topicals. - Performing Surgery. - Ensuring Prisoners & [bold][color=#004d75]Security Staff[/bold][/color] stay in good health. - Monitoring Vitals.
To be considered not negligent in their job responsibilities, they must maintain at least: - 2 stacks of Brute Topicals (40 total) - 2 stacks of Burn Topicals (2 full canisters) - 100u of each kind of healing chemical for a damage category, except for genetic and caustic.
Standard [bold][color=green]Code Green[/bold][/color] Equipment:
or
in
or
